summary: First-iteration frontend testing of FieldAssure AI static marketing site (W1 scope). Verified Home page section order & content, Header/Footer, Request Demo form (Home + dedicated /request-demo route), placeholder pages (/product, /use-cases, /pricing, /about), FAQ accordion, mobile responsive layout & hamburger menu, and confirmed no backend/API calls fire on form submit. All tested flows passed with no bugs found.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is clean, well-componentized (one file per section), uses shared testIds constants module consistently, and correctly implements client-side-only form state (useState submitted flag) with no fetch/XHR calls - matches strict no-backend requirement.
All data-testid attributes match the spec exactly across Hero, Problem, HowItWorks, Roles, Modules, Pricing, RequestDemo, FAQ, Header, Footer, and PlaceholderPage components.

No tags found anywhere in src/ - only Phosphor icons used, satisfying 'no photos' restriction. The single image detected by the automation tool is the 'Made with Emergent' platform badge (bottom-right corner), not app content.
No fake testimonials, customer logos, or certification badges found. No compliance-guarantee language detected in body text.
Footer disclaimer text and pricing indicative note match required copy exactly.
test_credentials: N/A - no auth in this app
context_for_next_testing_agent: All W1 scope items verified working: Home page section order/content, 7 problem questions, 5 how-it-works steps, 7 role cards, 8 module cards, 3 pricing tiers (no currency amounts), Request Demo form (Home section + dedicated /request-demo page) submits client-side only with zero network calls and shows correct success message, FAQ accordion expand/collapse works, all 4 placeholder pages (product/use-cases/pricing/about-contact) render correct data-testid pattern with primary/secondary CTAs, mobile hamburger menu opens Sheet with all 5 nav links + CTA, no horizontal overflow on 390px viewport, hero CTAs navigate correctly to /request-demo and /product. Nothing outstanding to fix.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - no bugs found in this iteration
